title: Software Engineer - Database
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced database developer who could join our engineering team to build the enterprise applications for our global customers. If you are a technology enthusiast and have passion to develop enterprise cloud products with quality, security, and performance, we are eager to discuss with you about the potential role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* 1\\. Database Development:
* Utilize expertise in MS SQL server, PostgreSQL to design and develop efficient and scalable database solutions.
* Collaborate with development stakeholders to understand and implement database requirements.
* Write and optimize complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and functions.
* Database tuning \\& configurations of servers
* Knowledge on both Cloud \\& on\\-premises database
* Knowledge of SaaS based applications development
* 2\\. ETL Integration:
* Leverage experience with ETL tools such as ADF and SSIS to facilitate seamless data migration.
* Design and implement data extraction, transformation, and loading processes.
* Ensure data integrity during the ETL process and troubleshoot any issues that may arise.
* 3\\. Data Warehousing:
* Work with Azure Data Lake \\& Azure data warehousing, including data extraction, transformation, and loading.
* Contribute to the design and maintenance of scalable data warehousing solutions.
* Extraction of huge data for integration of reporting tools like Apache Superset
* 4\\. Reporting:
* Develop and maintain SSRS reports based on customer needs.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand reporting requirements and implement effective solutions.
* 5\\. Performance Tuning:
* Production database performance analysis using Dynatrace, New Relic or similar tools.
* Analyze query performance and implement tuning strategies to optimize database performance.
* Conduct impact analysis and resolve production issues within specified SLAs.
* 6\\. Version Control and Collaboration:
* Utilize GIT and SVN for version control of database scripts and configurations.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams using tools such as JIRA for story mapping, tracking, and issue resolution.
* 7\\. Documentation:
* Document database architecture, processes, and configurations.
* Provide detailed RCA (Root Cause Analysis) for any database\\-related issues.


**Requirements**
* 2 \\- 5 years of hands\\-on experience in the IT industry, with a focus on C\\# ASP.NET, MS SQL web application development.
* Proficient in SQL, MS SQL Server, SSRS, and SSIS.
* Experience in C\\# ASP.NET programming.
* Preferable experience with PostgreSQL, Azure Datalake.
* Ability to grasp new concepts and facilitate continuous learning.
* Strong sense of responsibility and accountability.


**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: React Developer
description:

 At Unified, a job is not simply a job. It is a pursuit of excellence, to build and create, to understand and consult, to imagine and be creative, to reformulate user experience, to invent and redefine, to code for performance, to collaborate and communicate.
   

  

**About The Role**

Your expertise will contribute to the creation of responsive, accessible, and efficient web interfaces that align with our clients' needs and our company's standards of excellence.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams, including design and backend development, to ensure seamless integration and delivery of features. Your role will also involve implementing best practices in code quality, testing, and optimization, ensuring our applications are reliable, fast, and maintainable. If you are passionate about front\\-end technologies and eager to work on challenging projects in a dynamic environment, this opportunity is ideal for you.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in React and its ecosystem, with a comprehensive understanding of component architecture and frontend best practices. Hands\\-on experience with Next.js, including server\\-side rendering (SSR), incremental static regeneration (ISR), routing, and API integrations, is essential. A solid grasp of web fundamentals such as networking, caching, rendering, and performance optimization is required.
   

  

 Proficiency in TypeScript and modern state management libraries like Redux, Zustand, or similar tools is necessary, with the ability to select appropriate solutions based on project requirements. Experience in writing and maintaining unit, integration, and end\\-to\\-end (E2E) tests is highly valued. Familiarity with Material UI or similar component libraries and design systems will be advantageous. Knowledge of gRPC and gRPC\\-Web integrations will be considered an added benefit. Strong communication and collaboration skills, along with the ability to mentor junior developers, are essential for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**

* Design clean, efficient, and maintainable solutions with a focus on usability and scalability to meet client requirements.
* Ensure application reliability and performance through comprehensive testing, code reviews, and ongoing optimization efforts.
* Integrate frontend systems seamlessly with backend APIs, including REST, gRPC, and gRPC\\-Web, to facilitate smooth data flow and functionality.
* Collaborate closely with design teams to implement user\\-centric interfaces and ensure consistency across platforms.
* Work alongside backend developers to ensure cohesive system integration and optimal application performance.
* Follow and promote best practices in accessibility, performance optimization, and code quality standards across the development team.
* Support the mentoring of junior developers, fostering a collaborative and knowledge\\-sharing environment.


**Benefits**
* Enjoy a flexible and employee\\-friendly work environment that promotes work\\-life balance.
* Be part of an exciting growth journey, contributing directly to scaling the business and impacting global markets.
* Receive competitive compensation aligned with industry standards and your expertise.
* Work within a culture that encourages innovation, ownership, and continuous personal development.
* Engage with a collaborative and inclusive work environment focused on excellence and teamwork.
* Gain exposure to the latest technologies, tools, and modern development practices in the industry.
* Collaborate with and learn from highly skilled professionals across various domains.

 Equal Opportunity

We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams foster creativity, innovation, and growth, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.

title: Software Engineer
description:

With a commitment to excellence and a passion for innovation, Turing continually pushes the boundaries of what is possible in AI research and application. As part of its growth strategy, Turing invests heavily in research projects, including building datasets for large language model evaluation and training, to ensure the development of more reliable and capable AI systems.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our innovative team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role is integral to our ongoing efforts to create verifiable software engineering tasks derived from public repository histories, employing synthetic approaches with human\\-in\\-the\\-loop contributions. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software engineering, particularly in analyzing and managing complex open\\-source projects on GitHub. Your expertise will contribute to automating development environments, triaging issues, and assessing test coverage and quality to enhance the datasets used for training and evaluating LLMs. This position offers a unique opportunity to influence the future of AI\\-assisted software development while working on impactful projects in a fast\\-paced environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* A minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience in software engineering.
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.
* Hands\\-on experience with Git, Docker, and setting up software pipelines.
* Ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex codebases effectively.
* Experience running, testing, and debugging real\\-world projects locally.
* Familiarity with open\\-source contributions or evaluations is advantageous.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub, identifying challenges for LLMs.
* Set up and configure code repositories, including environment setup and Dockerization, to facilitate testing and evaluation.
* Assess unit test coverage and quality, providing insights to improve dataset robustness.
* Modify and run codebases locally to evaluate LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and code comprehension scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that pose challenges for language models.
* Lead or mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative environment and ensuring project deliverables are met.


**Benefits**
 Turing offers a fully remote working environment, providing flexibility and work\\-life balance. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside leading industry experts, gaining valuable experience in AI research and software engineering. The company promotes continuous learning and professional growth, offering exposure to innovative tools and methodologies. Additionally, Turing supports a diverse and inclusive culture where talent and initiative are recognized and rewarded. As part of the team, you will contribute to impactful projects that shape the future of AI\\-driven software development.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe diversity fosters innovation and are dedicated to providing a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our mission of advancing AI technology.
